title: 目標達成の後に・Open Horizon

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Um, I've decided which race I'd like to run first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's training is progressing without
issue. By now, she's strengthened her body
enough to participate in even the most intense
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I was thinking of contacting her to find out
her goals so I could put together a schedule, she
contacted me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I want to run in the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My heart was pounding so hard when I watched
that race...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All of the runners looked so beautiful and proud
as they ran.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I used to think that anything would be fine as
long as I could run, but this is the first race I've
felt particularly strongly about.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I just know there must be something special about
it, and I'd like to discover what it is for myself!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, a G1 would make wonderful
news for everyone back home.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be here right now without everyone's
understanding and support.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have to return home with my head held high if I
wish to show them my gratitude.
choice_data_list:
Then it's settled. Our long-term objective is the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

Then it's settled. Our long-term objective is the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Our long-term objective? ...Oh, I see. It's still a
long way off, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What kind of path do people normally take
leading up to it?
choice_data_list:
I'd say most people compete in the Triple Tiara
tour.

I'd say most people compete in the Triple Tiara
tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Tiara tour is comprised of three
grandiose races that can only be joined in one's
classic year—the Oka Sho, the Japanese Oaks,
and the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Is that right?! Then, perhaps I should as well. I
wouldn't want to buck tradition, now. ♪
choice_data_list: We can give it a shot, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion didn't originally plan on having a
racing career when she joined Tracen Academy,
so she has had far less time to train than the
others in her year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than push herself in the spring races where
the ability gap will still be large, I suggest we
hone her skills through the summer and begin
racing in earnest come autumn.
choice_data_list: But it's ultimately up to you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then, there's only one answer! I want to run in the
spring!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now that I can race, I simply must take on as
many as possible!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Besides, performing on such a grand stage should
show me should show me a truly wonderful view,
don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see. My heart can pound even harder...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wonderful views, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You weren't lying when you said it would be even
better than now, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to know more. I want to experience
everything that racing has to offer!
choice_data_list:
I'm sure you'll discover joys you could never
find anywhere else.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Okay, it's decided then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run in the Triple Tiara tour and then
the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!
choice_data_list: First up is the Oka Sho in the spring!
First up is the Oka Sho in the spring!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we've decided that our next race goal is
the Oka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Spring... I'm sure it will be here in the blink of an
eye. I have to make sure to cherish each and
every moment.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When can we see the cherry blossoms? If I were to
plant a tree in your office, then—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm kidding, of course.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It was just a joke...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Aha, you got me! Okay, okay. ♪
